title: Center top section on Schweiz, Basel, and Zürich landing pages (desktop view)

requirements.text: On the SwissOnlineCouplesLandingPage, BaselCouplesLandingPage, and ZurichCouplesLandingPage, ensure the topmost section (hero/header section) is horizontally centered in desktop view, consistent with the centering applied to lower sections on these pages.

quotes: Auf der Schweiz, Basel und Zürich Seite muss der oberste Abschnitt ebenfalls zentriert sein in der Desktop ansicht

acceptanceCriteria: On desktop viewport widths (≥ 1024px), the topmost section of SwissOnlineCouplesLandingPage is horizontally centered.
On desktop viewport widths (≥ 1024px), the topmost section of BaselCouplesLandingPage is horizontally centered.
On desktop viewport widths (≥ 1024px), the topmost section of ZurichCouplesLandingPage is horizontally centered.
The centering style matches the layout style used in the lower sections of these same pages.
Mobile layout is not affected by this change.

constraints: Do not change the mobile layout of any page.
Do not alter the content or structure of the top sections — only apply centering styles.
nonGoals: Centering sections on any other pages (HomePage, AboutPage, CouplesPage, etc.)
Changes to lower sections on the Schweiz, Basel, or Zürich pages
